title: Precision Craft Knife Set With 2 Knives and 10 Spare Blades - Professional Exacto for Adult Carving, Hobby, Modeling and Art Projects
features: 【Precision Craft Knife Set】This craft knife set includes 2 multi-functional knife handles with safety caps and 10 replacement blades. Designed for precise cutting, this set is the perfect gift for carving enthusiasts.

【High Quality】These tools feature all-aluminum alloy handles, which are lightweight, exceptionally durable, and comfortable to hold. They are specifically designed for precise carving, delivering outstanding results. Even during prolonged use, you won’t feel fatigued.

【Product Design】The connection between the blade and the handle is made of metal, ensuring a secure fit and preventing the blade from detaching during use. Rest assured, every design detail is focused on your safety.

【Ergonomic Design】Our art knives feature a simple blade installation mechanism—simply push the blade into the cross-section of the handle and tighten the handle. The lightweight design and textured handle provide exceptional control and precision, allowing you to effortlessly bring your creative visions to life.

【Wide Range of Applications】: The carving knife is suitable for precise cutting of models, artworks, trimming paper, cardboard, wallpaper, aluminum foil, plastic, wood, fabric, leather, and foam board crafts.
description: Wide range of applications: The carving knife is suitable for precision cutting of models, artworks, trimming paper, cardboard, wallpaper, aluminum foil, plastic, wood, fabric, leather, and foam board crafts. - The blade is made of aluminum alloy, sharp and wear-resistant. - The handle features an anti-slip threaded design for comfortable grip. - Lightweight, high-strength, durable, and stable operation. Product Specifications Color: Silver Blade Material: Aluminum Alloy
